# Publications & Talks

#### **Foundational papers for the lab**

{inset paper citations that are important for the lab? BIDS Paper, ENIGMA Mega-Analyses... GWAS}

#### **Talks given by Dr. Turner!**

<https://youtu.be/KO2y6mC_rGA?si=5xEHG0G6mmFmYLOx>

<https://www.youtube.com/live/dKCNbKZxazw?si=NIXcfc4C5Pb-l0EA>

<https://youtu.be/r_gC9ZgS-EA?si=PhLwC3XHdbyFYGPA>
